prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement consumer offset management: the OffsetAndMetadata storage in __consumer_offsets, the GroupCoordinator offset commit handler, the OffsetFetch request processor, and the offset expiry/compaction logic.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement consumer offset management: the OffsetAndMetadata storage in __consumer_offsets, the GroupCoordinator offset commit handler, the OffsetFetch request processor, and the offset expiry/compaction logic.
